title: Set Meshtastic gateway payload to 200
description: Boot failure discovered by project-LICHEN-m5m1.5. meshtastic_gateway_adapter fails on Native64 and QEMU because CONFIG_LICHEN_APP_INTERFACE_MAX_PAYLOAD resolves to the subsystem default 176 before the gateway conditional default 200, triggering the required static assertion. Make the test/feature configuration select 200 explicitly and remove or correct the misleading ineffective default without weakening the assertion.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Meshtastic adapter effective payload is 200 on native and QEMU tests. 2. The compile-time assertion remains. 3. Ineffective Kconfig default is corrected or no longer claims enforcement. 4. Both firmware scenarios boot and pass. 5. Three independent review passes complete.
close_reason: Configured 200-byte Meshtastic payload explicitly and removed the ineffective conditional default; gateway adapter passes Native64 and QEMU, BLE adapter passes 13 Native64 cases; review completed.
